eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 5:20 PM on JUL 10, 2026 Effective until 11:20 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-016 near 18000 block E Evans Creek Road due to East Evans Creek rd Fire. Monitor local government sources for evacuation and incident updates
